name: linux-ops
description: Agent-native Linux 操作 skill，通过 SSH 提供系统、文件、进程、网络、包管理、服务、传输、锁等可组合 primitives；面向 AI 大模型推理驱动的无人值守运维，支持自治等级、decision record、Python runtime agent gate、严格决策校验、语义防护、自治策略校验、mock execute/verify/rollback 测试矩阵、审计 schema、组合观测、升级通知、批量并发、策略拦截、脱敏、审计、显式 sudo 重试和 inventory 校验。
description_en: Agent-native Linux operations skill over SSH, providing composable primitives for system, file, process, network, package, service, transfer, and lock operations. Designed as an AI-native operations substrate for model-driven reasoning and bounded unattended operation, with autonomy levels, decision records, Python runtime agent gate enforcement, strict decision validation, semantic guard, autonomy policy validation, mock execute/verify/rollback tests, audit schema, composite observations, escalation notifications, batch execution, policy guardrails, redaction, audit logs, explicit sudo retry, and inventory validation.
about_en: AI-native SSH/Linux ops substrate with composable primitives, autonomy levels, decision records, Python runtime gate, semantic guard, autonomy policy validation, composite observations, escalation, and bounded unattended operation.
author: kakahu2015
